title: Keep Mulch and Seeds docs version-agnostic
rationale: The project intends to use the latest Mulch and Seeds releases, so hard-coded onboarding versions in AGENTS.md quickly become stale.

name: dedicated-epic-board-view
description: Roadmap Epic Board UX keeps roadmap rows and issue detail modals lightweight: both expose Open Epic Board actions, while the six-column board and collapsible dependency tree render only in the dedicated full-width dashboard view.

Opening Epic Board could freeze the dashboard with no console errors because the dependency tree model recursively traversed blockers and dependents at every node, producing hundreds of thousands of React nodes for dense dependency graphs.
resolution: Keep dependency-tree recursion bounded and direction-specific: blocked-card groups show dependents separately, blocker branches recurse through blockers only, dependent branches recurse through dependents only, with a depth cap and regression coverage for dense graphs.
